content: Life360's SOS sends a silent alert with location to Circle + emergency contacts; paid tiers add 24/7 human Emergency Dispatch that calls the user back to verify before contacting police/ambulance. Cancellation is a 'Slide to Cancel' gesture available on free and paid tiers. Apple's Emergency SOS uses a 3-5 second countdown (hold button or 5x press) with haptic/visible countdown and a cancel X before auto-dialing 911.
